original_image_tags: A full-page, dark background document, likely a card or form, with typed text in light ink at the top. Two prominent white punch holes are visible at the top edge, and two dark punch holes on the left edge. The word "RESTRICTED" is stamped faintly in large letters across the top and bottom of the page. In the bottom right corner, a handwritten annotation in light ink reads: 88a.

elements.description: A typed document page with 'RESTRICTED' stamps at the top and bottom, containing a text report about an ONL plane sighting a projectile, including a note about Rjuken, Norway.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of 'RESTRICTED' stamps and that the page is a typed document, but Description A adds specific visual details (punch holes, handwritten annotation) that Description B omits without contradicting them.
